# Regex fixtures for skill: batch-scripting
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH lines pin the both-side mass anchor: MASSive must not fire
# (mass is the one prefix-contaminated word in the registry).

MATCH: mass rename the fixtures
MATCH: do a mass-update of the imports
MATCH: batch process the log files
MATCH: refactor all the call sites

NO_MATCH: this test file is massive can we split it
NO_MATCH: the massive refactor we discussed
NO_MATCH: investigate the production outage from last night
